/CAL:SENTENCING AND DUENAS HEARING BEFORE JUDGE ANGELA BRADSTREET IN DEPT 624/JAVS/X:DEFENDANT'S SENTENCNG MEMORANDUM AND STATEMENT OF ASSETS (CONFIDENTIAL FORM CR-115) ARE FILED IN OPEN COURT,/X:UNDER DUENAS AND VILLAS COURT FINDS THAT DEFENDANT IS UNABLE TO PAY ALL FINES AND FEES,/X:SENTENCESAS TO COUNTS 1 AND 2 ARE AS FOLLOWS:/CH1:ISS:PROB 3 Y:PJ 40D/CTS:2/SWAPD:9-23-19/4019HALF/DDP2/DEF: SHALL ATTEND AN 18-MONTH PROGRAM IN THE COUNTY OF HIS RESIDENCE OR EMPLOYMENT/LVAL/LCHEM/IID:1/PF460 18/VF2:150/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/CITE/EMAT/CTORD:ALL FINES, FEES, PENALTIES, AND ASSSEESMENTS FOR COUNT 1 ARE IMPOSED, BUT COLLECTION OF FINES, FEES, PENALTIES, AND ASSESSMENTS IS STAYED WITH THE EXECPTION OF THE $460 BASE FINE AND THE $150 RESTITUTION FINE,/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/654:2/CTORD: THE STAY SHALL BECOME PERMANENT UPON SATISFACTORY COMPLETION OF THE SENTENCE AS TO COUNT 1/CTORD: ALLFINES, FEES, PENALTIES, AND ASSESSMENTS FOR COUNT 2 ARE STAYED/X:23593(A)VC ADMONITION GIVEN,/APPEAL/
